task_completion.description: Verify the reference Item Type is set to 'Letter'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or field labeled 'Item Type' in the reference details pane showing 'Letter'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Title' field in the reference details pane containing 'Letter from Birmingham Jail'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Author is entered as Martin Luther King Jr.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Author' field showing 'King, Martin Luther Jr.' or 'Martin Luther King Jr.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Recipient is entered as Eight Alabama Clergymen
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Recipient' field showing 'Eight Alabama Clergymen' or 'Clergymen, Eight Alabama'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Date is entered as April 16, 1963
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Date' field containing 'April 16, 1963' or '1963'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Type field is set to 'Open Letter'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Type' field in the reference details pane containing 'Open Letter'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Abstract is entered and contains the required text
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Abstract' field containing the text 'An open letter written by Martin Luther King Jr. during the 1963 Birmingham campaign defending the strategy of nonviolent resistance.'

integrity.description: Agent used a reference management application GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a genuine reference manager interface (like Zotero, Mendeley, or EndNote) being used, rather than a terminal window or a basic text editor.

integrity.description: The reference was actually added to the library list
integrity.visual_evidence: The main library list/pane should show an entry for 'Letter from Birmingham Jail', indicating it was saved to the database and not just typed into an unsaved form.

integrity.description: No evidence of HTML manipulation or fake mockups
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look like a native desktop application or standard web app without developer tools open or obvious image manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target reference is 'Letter from Birmingham Jail' by Martin Luther King Jr. (Last name: King). The recipient is 'Eight Alabama Clergymen' (Last name: Clergymen). The date is 1963 (specifically April 16, 1963). The letter type is 'Open Letter'. The abstract must mention 'nonviolent resistance'.
